title: Prompt Security, Untrusted Context, Privacy, and Authorization · Evaluation Brief: Output Validation
summary: Harden a tool-using prompt that processes untrusted documents and external results. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt output validation increment in a prompt threat model and red-team suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate model outputs before execution, publication, or use in security decisions.
Exclude secrets and irrelevant proprietary context and minimize tool privileges.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
